chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 231 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1079/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.05.2025 Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG pointed out that the process of recruitment has been completed, whereas, the instant Constitutional Petition was filed only in respect of completing the process. After such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition and submits that for his personal grievance, the petitioner will file a fresh petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
